title: Endermen To Slenderman
description: This Texture Pack Retextures Endermen To Look Like Slenderman
body:
Slenderman Endermen Retexture
This resource pack transforms Minecraft's Endermen into the creepy Slenderman!

Features:

Endermen now look like Slenderman

Works with Minecraft 1.21.4 and 1.21.5

Installation:
Put the pack in your "resourcepacks" folder and activate in-game.

I made this pack because I love both Minecraft and Creepypasta. It's a simple change, but it adds a small new level of spookiness to your world!

Enjoy the pack, and let me know what you think!
